message:
fix(mysql): replace broken oversized-header test with max-size acceptance test

The test_decode_packet_header_rejects_oversized_packet test was
fundamentally broken: MAX_PACKET_SIZE + 1 = 0x01000000 wraps to 0
when encoded in a 3-byte little-endian field, so the test was actually
testing length=0 rather than an oversized packet. The > MAX_PACKET_SIZE
guard in decode_packet_header is unreachable since the 3-byte max
(0xFFFFFF) equals MAX_PACKET_SIZE exactly.

Replace with test_decode_packet_header_accepts_max_packet_size that
verifies the maximum representable value (0xFFFFFF) is accepted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
